Q_AR.note: double-centered L (row mean + column mean removed). Consume here in PCA, F_ST.

D_AR.note: pairwise squared Euclidean on Q; approximates KL under small-divergence Taylor (ModelMap Sec. 6.1).

Q_MLM.note: double-centered L (row mean + column mean removed). Consume here in PCA, F_ST.

D_MLM.note: pairwise squared Euclidean on Q; approximates KL under small-divergence Taylor (ModelMap Sec. 6.1).

protocol: Single-matrix protocol per branch (ModelMap, commit 5e59154). L[m, x] = sum_log_p_m(x) in raw nats (no length normalization, no sign flip). L_clipped = floor_clip(L, q=0.02); Q = double_center(L_clipped); D = pairwise_squared_distance(Q). Codon models (GenSLM, Codon-NT) emit raw likelihood on every probe and enter L alongside nucleotide-tokenized models; the codon-vs-nucleotide systematic offset on noncoding probes is absorbed by the row-mean and column-mean subtraction during double-centering. The earlier three-matrix split (R_pan_DNA / R_coding_only / R_nucleotide_only) is retired.
